description: SUM(o.total_amount) as total_spend FROM demo_ecommerce.customers c JOIN demo_ecommerce.orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_name ORDER BY total_spend DESC
COUNT(DISTINCT oi.order_id) as order_count FROM demo_ecommerce.products p JOIN demo_ecommerce.order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.category
SUM(o.total_amount) as daily_revenue FROM demo_ecommerce.orders o GROUP BY DATE(o.order_date) ORDER BY date
SUM(oi.quantity) as total_quantity FROM demo_ecommerce.products p JOIN demo_ecommerce.order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.product_name ORDER BY total_quantity DESC LIMIT 10
column4: Top 10 best selling products by quantity
